parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: false, error: 'tenantId et note (1-5) requis' } }}

parameters.query:
={{ (function() {
  var d = $('02. Parse Input').first().json;
  return "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS avis ("
    + "id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), "
    + "tenant_id UUID NOT NULL, "
    + "lead_id UUID, "
    + "nom VARCHAR(100), "
    + "prenom VARCHAR(100), "
    + "entreprise VARCHAR(200), "
    + "email VARCHAR(200), "
    + "telephone VARCHAR(20), "
    + "note INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 5 CHECK (note >= 1 AND note <= 5), "
    + "commentaire TEXT, "
    + "channel VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'web', "
    + "token VARCHAR(100), "
    + "affiche BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, "
    + "created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(), "
    + "updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()"
    + "); "
    + "INSERT INTO avis (tenant_id, lead_id, nom, prenom, entreprise, email, telephone, note, commentaire, channel, token) VALUES ("
    + "'" + d.tenantId + "', "
    + (d.leadId ? "'" + d.leadId + "'" : "NULL") + ", "
    + "'" + d.nom + "', "
    + "'" + d.prenom + "', "
    + "'" + d.entreprise + "', "
    + "'" + d.email + "', "
    + "'" + d.telephone + "', "
    + d.note + ", "
    + "'" + d.commentaire + "', "
    + "'" + d.channel + "', "
    + (d.token ? "'" + d.token + "'" : "NULL")
    + ") RETURNING id, note, channel, created_at";
})() }}

parameters.jsCode:
var row = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { success: true, avisId: row.id, note: row.note, channel: row.channel, createdAt: row.created_at } }];

parameters.text:
={{ '⭐ Nouvel avis client !

' + '👤 ' + ($('02. Parse Input').first().json.prenom || '') + ' ' + ($('02. Parse Input').first().json.nom || '') + '
' + '⭐ Note: ' + $('02. Parse Input').first().json.note + '/5
' + '💬 ' + ($('02. Parse Input').first().json.commentaire || '').substring(0, 200) + '
' + '📡 Canal: ' + $('02. Parse Input').first().json.channel }}
